Enumeration Case# kSCSIServiceResponse_Request_In_Process

macOS 10.0+

```
kSCSIServiceResponse_Request_In_Process = 0
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/kernel/scsiserviceresponse/kscsiserviceresponse_request_in_process#discussion)

Not defined in SAM specification, but is a service response used for asynchronous commands that are not yet completed.
